name: field service technicians in home services managing 5–15 maintenance checks/month tool
description: For field service technicians in home services processing 5–15 maintenance checks/month, missed maintenance checks cause equipment failures. We automate scheduling and reminders instead of manual scheduling and reminders via phone or paper.

problem_solved: missed maintenance checks leading to equipment failures
features: manual entry option for additional tasks
